OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Harry Dorfman; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Ike Okwousa.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Dee Thomas is present.
Attorney Timothy Haas representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was not filed. The trial date of July 29, 2013 vacated. (501/JPT)
